content.content:
For lunch in Paris, I recommend **Le Baratin**, which serves French cuisine and has the highest rating of **4.8**. The cost per person is **€30.00**.

For dinner, I recommend **Bistrot Paul Bert**, which serves French cuisine and has a rating of **4.5**. The cost per person is **€40.00**.

If you'd like, I can help you make a reservation at either of these restaurants. Let me know!
